title: Bapesta x MF Doom - Size 11.5 Men’s
description: The Bapesta x MF Doom sneakers in size 11.5 for men are a stylish and unique addition to any casual outfit. Featuring a lace-up closure and a low-top shoe shaft style, these sneakers offer comfort and are perfect for springtime wear. Made with patent leather and a rubber outsole, they combine quality materials with a distinctive black color scheme and signature MF Doom character design. These custom sneakers from Japan's Bapesta brand are a fashionable choice for those looking to make a statement with their footwear.
